protected_invariants: Never commit API keys, tokens, or secrets.
Never modify .sdlc-framework.config.json agent models, providers, or API keys without explicit approval.
Preserve agent role boundaries: backend, devops, qa, frontend, aiqa, orchestrator, reviewer are separate concerns.
Keep DeepSeek V4 Flash as the primary model for aiqa and orchestrator unless explicitly overridden.
openprovider configs in opencode.json and provider configs in .sdlc-framework.config.json must stay in sync.
Worker pool (Bonsai 1-bit) is for summarization/search only, never for code generation decisions.

rules: One logical change per branch; do not mix unrelated fixes.
Rebase onto target before opening a PR.

before_claiming_done: run the focused tests for the changed area (npm test or cargo test as appropriate)
run lint and typecheck if applicable (npm run lint, npm run typecheck, or similar)
read changed files back to confirm the edit landed as intended
never claim verification you did not perform

escalate_when: an action is destructive or hard to reverse and was not explicitly authorized
changing provider/auth/config or anything that sends data to an external service
committing or pushing files without explicit user request
deleting files you did not create
modifying agent strength assignments or model roles in .sdlc-framework.config.json
changing the active project or its workspace path
